## HEADER

Zelma Kunde
40745MayertTrail,Houston,TXPhone:+1(555)4931757

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

EXPERIENCE
PRINCIPALDATASCIENCEMANAGER
### Dallas,TX
**Date:** 03/2016-present
- ·Lead andgrowtheDataScience&MachineLearning team
- Knowledge andexperiencewith open source technologies
- Actquickly onnewideas
- ·Astrongrecord ofpriorresearch and/orproductdevelopmentexperience
- ·QualityAssurance and Testing
- Takepart inrecruiting,includingreviewing,shaping,andevolving ourprocess,trainingteam members to intervieweffectively,andproactivelyengagingcandidates

## TECHNICAL SKILLS

Develop thetoolstobestdriveinsights across thebreadthof theSkype Consumerfamilyofproducts throughboth aggregateandreal time data streams
Champion the use of Data Science practices across all aspects of our product and service portfolio and across our business engagements
Helpfurther drive our culture of Learning through buildingfostering exploration and discovery
Are nherentlycurious,energized bylarge challenges,and interestedinmaking a significant mpact ona globallyscaledbusiness
·Develop data-driveninsights&solutionswith advanced analytics(machinelearning,deeplearningand statistical models)to extract insightsfrom large proprietary agronomic data sources(millions of acres of farm data,terabytesofimagery andcorrespondingweather/soil/genetics data)
Identify,implement,and present results ofresearch on novel ways machinelearning approaches can improvedecisions,addvaluetoservices,andcontributetotheadvancement ofideasinto themarketplace &agriculture

·DevelopKPIs and measures of success in a cross-platform world
Leaddevelopmentofdata tools,such as dashboardsandA/B testingplatforms
SKILLS
·Abilitytoworkautonomouslyinthecompletionofdeliverables
·Excellent communicationandpresentation skills:able toexplainAnalyticsinnon-technical terms to business users (C-level,line managers,...)
·Proven ability tobuild,manage andfostera team-orientedenvironment

## MACHINE LEARNING & DEEP LEARNING

Workwith other teams toidentifyproblemsindifferent areaswhere datamining/machine learning/statisticscan help
Communicate results;develop andmaintain strong relationships withkey stakeholders,partners and internal clients
Manageandbuild outa teamofmotivatedAnalysts,DataScientists andorStatisticians
Drivebusinessvalue;prioritizeinitiatives to ensure delivery ofbusinessvalue while continuing tobuild outtheteam'scorecompetencies
